title: 2x Dog Bubbles – PEANUT BUTTER and BEEF Scented, Safe Blowing Bubbles for Dogs, Interactive Toys for Boredom, Suitable for Puppies to Large Dogs(240ml, Beef - Pink)
features: 【EASY TO USE & CARRY】Each bottle contains 120ml of Bubble liquid solution that can be easily used to form and blow fun bubbles for an interactive play with your Dog.
【FLAVOURS & COLORS】The dog bubbles are available in 2 Scents: BEEF and PEANUT BUTTER. 1 Bubble Stick (wand) is included with each bottle. Lightweight and Easy to Carry.
【SATISFACTION】The bubble Solution is absolutely Safe and Non-Toxic Bubble Mix and excites the dog with its flavour. Great to break Dog Boredom with this fun bubbles.

【INTERACTIVE DOG TOY】Bubble Liquid is made with Scented Oil (BEEF and PEANUT BUTTER). Irresistible for any Dog. Great Stimulation for pet as it encourages a playful interaction between you and your Dog
【MULTI-PURPOSE DOGS TOY】The solution of these bubbles for Dogs can also be used with Bubble Gun, bubble machine or wand. Each bottle has been separately packed for long and easy storage.
description: Product description Fun Bubbles for Dogs in 120ml Bottle Get your Dogs engaged with this fun bubbles solution as an interactive toy between you and your pet. It contains Scented Oil in 2 different flavours (BEEF and PEANUT BUTTER). Great way to stimulate your pet’s Playful behaviour as it encourages an interactive play between you and your dog. These bubbles are absolutely safe and Non-Toxic. Please see at the back of product for Directions to use. FEATURES Dog Interactive Play 120ml (easy to carry) Safe Non Toxic Scented Oil in BEEF or PEANUT BUTTER Paw Shaped Lid 【EASY TO USE & CARRY 】 Each bottle contains 120ml of Bubble liquid solution that can be easily used to form and blow fun bubbles for an interactive play with your Dog. 【FLAVOURS & COLORS 】 The dog bubbles are available in 2 Scents: BEEF and PEANUT BUTTER. 1 Bubble Stick (wand) is included with each bottle. Lightweight and Easy to Carry. 【SATISFACTION 】 The bubble Solution is absolutely Safe and Non-Toxic Bubble Mix and excites the dog with its flavour. Great to break Dog Boredom with this fun bubbles. 【INTERACTIVE PLAY 】 The bubble Liquid is made with Scented Oil (BEEF and PEANUT BUTTER), which is irresistible for any Dog. Great Stimulation for your pet as it encourages a playful interaction between you and your Dog 【MULTI-PURPOSE DOGS TOY 】 The solution of these bubbles for Dogs can also be used with Bubble Gun, bubble machine or wand. Each bottle has been separately packed for long and easy storage. PACKAGE INCLUDES 2x 120ml Bottle and 2x Wand with each Bottle (Colours and Quantity as Selected) WARNING For Dog Use Only Playtime should always be supervised. Bottle is made of Plastic and not meant for Chewing Directions For Dog Use Only
